issues.description: Card text '[DON!! x1]' indicates a cost requirement (1 DON required to activate), not a condition check. Should use cost property, not HasRestingDon condition. HasRestingDon checks for resting DON on the card, which is not what the text describes.
Target scope should include 'maxCount' to limit to 'up to 1' character. Current target only specifies maxCost but not maxCount restriction.
